post.summary: Teacher save attendance for 1 student (can be use for many student)

patch.summary: Teacher check out 1 attendance record (set checkout time = now)

get.summary: Check attendance history of a student (EX: fromDate=2026-03-01 to Date=2026-03-31)

post.summary:
Assign mutilple students to class
Body: { "studentIds": [1, 2, 3] }
Assign teacher to class with specific role(each class just have 1 "Main" teacher)

get.summary: Get invoice by ID (includes items + payments)

put.summary: Update invoice (discount, status, due date, notes)

post.summary: Batch mark all expired unpaid invoices as Overdue
Record a payment for an invoice. Auto-updates invoice status (Partial / Paid).

delete.summary: Delete payment and recalculate invoice status

get.summary: Get all payments for an invoice

post.summary: Assign relationship between student and parent

patch.summary: Update relationship between student and parent (relationship type, primary contact)

delete.summary: Delete relationship between student and parent

get.summary: Lấy tất cả cấu hình hệ thống
Lấy cấu hình theo key (ví dụ: SchoolName)

put.summary:
Cập nhật 1 cấu hình theo key
Body: { "settingValue": "Happy Kids School" }

Cập nhật nhiều cấu hình cùng lúc
Body: { "settings": { "SchoolName": "ABC", "SchoolPhone": "0901234567" } }

post.summary: Create new tuition template with items

put.summary: Update template (pass Items to replace all items)

delete.summary: Delete template (blocked if used by invoices)

get.summary: Get all pending users (waiting for approval)
Get role of a specific user
Get all users without any role
Get role statistics (count users per role)

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.
Bearer.name: Authorization
